body.fact: Claude Haiku 4.5 is the fastest Claude model with 'near-frontier intelligence.' It's designed for high-throughput tasks where speed and cost matter more than peak reasoning ability — like classification, extraction, or simple Q&A at scale.
body.context: API ID: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (alias: claude-haiku-4-5). Unlike Opus and Sonnet which are generation 4.6, Haiku is still generation 4.5. All three models share the same input/output capabilities (text, images, multilingual).
